{"description":"During `gt dolt rebase hq --yes-i-am-sure`, the rebase executes successfully but the integrity check finds `wisp_labels` table (242 rows) is missing from the rebased result. The rebase correctly aborts before swapping branches, so no data loss occurs.

Repro: Run `gt dolt rebase hq --yes-i-am-sure` when hq has 350+ commits and wisp_labels has rows.

Expected: All tables preserved after squash.
Actual: wisp_labels table dropped during squash. Integrity check catches it.

This may be a Dolt DOLT_REBASE bug where tables only modified via label operations get lost during squash."}
